attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
SO_NUMBER_INT,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
REV.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,
REV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
SERVICE_SKU  ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY   
,REV.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID          
 , REV_ALLOC_PCT   
, BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  
,'DV_SOL_BKGS_NEG'     RECORD_TYPE 
,(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT )   AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT )  AS DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
 ,( TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS     GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS      DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,(TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT   ) AS     DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS      DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT   ) AS     DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT    
FROM 
(
SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT,TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT<0  AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED' )AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)  TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,SUM(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT  )  AS TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
 ,SUM( GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ) AS     TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT    ) AS      TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT    ) AS     TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
 ,SUM(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  ) AS      TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
 ,SUM(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP
WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT<0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED' )   AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) TOTAL
ON NET.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=TOTAL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NET.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD=TOTAL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
) REV
  INNER JOIN 
(

SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  FROM 
(SEL SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BKGS_NEG WHERE  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) NET
INNER JOIN
(SELECT SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BKGS_NEG  WHERE  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED' )
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) TOTAL
ON NET.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=TOTAL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NET.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD=TOTAL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 )  BKGS
ON REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=BKGS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD

WHERE   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID SBP 
WHERE SBP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND SBP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
GROUP BY REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SALES_REP_NUMBER )

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
SO_NUMBER_INT,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY ,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
REV.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,
REV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
SERVICE_SKU ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,REV.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID 
,REV_ALLOC_PCT 
,BKGS_ALLOC_PCT 
,'DV_SOL_BKGS_NEG' RECORD_TYPE 
,(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,(TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT 

FROM (SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT,TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT

FROM (SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT<0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET')) NET

INNER JOIN(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,SUM(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP
WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT<0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) REV

INNER JOIN (SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM 
(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE') AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT >= 0 GROUP BY 1,2,3) NET

INNER JOIN (SELECT DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE') AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT >= 0 
GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) BKGS
ON REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID SBP 
WHERE SBP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND SBP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
GROUP BY REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SALES_REP_NUMBER)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
SO_NUMBER_INT,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY ,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
REV.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,
REV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
SERVICE_SKU ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,REV.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID 
,REV_ALLOC_PCT 
,BKGS_ALLOC_PCT 
,'DV_SOL_BKGS_NEG' RECORD_TYPE 
,(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,(TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT) AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT 

FROM (SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT,TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT

FROM (SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT<0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB OFFSET')) NET

INNER JOIN(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,SUM(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP
WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT<0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB OFFSET') GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) REV

INNER JOIN (SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM 
(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB') AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT >= 0 GROUP BY 1,2,3) NET

INNER JOIN (SELECT DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB') AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT >= 0 
GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) BKGS
ON REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID SBP 
WHERE SBP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND SBP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
GROUP BY REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SALES_REP_NUMBER)

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
SO_NUMBER_INT,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY ,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
REV.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,
REV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
SERVICE_SKU ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,REV.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID 
,REV_ALLOC_PCT 
,BKGS_ALLOC_PCT 
,'DV_SOL_BKGS_POS' RECORD_TYPE 
,(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,( TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,(TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT 
FROM 
(
SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT,TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET' )) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,SUM(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT ) AS TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,SUM( GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT ) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT ) AS TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP
WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
) REV

INNER JOIN (SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM 
(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE') AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT < 0 GROUP BY 1,2,3) NET
INNER JOIN
(SELECT DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE' ) AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT < 0 
GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ) BKGS
ON REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID SBP 
WHERE SBP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND SBP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
GROUP BY REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SALES_REP_NUMBER )

UNION ALL

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
SO_NUMBER_INT,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY ,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
REV.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,
REV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
SERVICE_SKU ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,REV.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID 
,REV_ALLOC_PCT 
,BKGS_ALLOC_PCT 
,'DV_SOL_BKGS_POS' RECORD_TYPE 
,(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,( TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,(TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT ) AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT 
FROM 
(
SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT,TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB OFFSET' )) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,SUM(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT ) AS TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
,SUM( GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT ) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT ) AS TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ) AS TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP
WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB OFFSET') GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
) REV
INNER JOIN (SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM 
(SEL DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB') AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT < 0 GROUP BY 1,2,3) NET

INNER JOIN (SELECT DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB' ) AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT < 0 
 GROUP BY 1,2) TOTAL
ON NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) BKGS
ON REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID SBP 
WHERE SBP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND SBP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
GROUP BY REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SALES_REP_NUMBER )

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
SO_NUMBER_INT,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
REV.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,
REV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
SERVICE_SKU  ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY   
,REV.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID          
 , REV_ALLOC_PCT   
, BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  
,'DV_SOL_BKGS_POS'     RECORD_TYPE 
,(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT )   AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,(TOTAL_DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT )  AS DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
 ,( TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS     GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS      DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,(TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT   ) AS     DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
,(TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  ) AS      DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,(TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  *REV_ALLOC_PCT* BKGS_ALLOC_PCT   ) AS     DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT    
FROM 
(
SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT,TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT>0  AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED' )AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)  TOTAL_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,SUM(DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT  )  AS TOTAL_DV_comp_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT 
 ,SUM( GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ) AS     TOTAL_GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SUM(DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT    ) AS      TOTAL_DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT    ) AS     TOTAL_DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT
 ,SUM(DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  ) AS      TOTAL_DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
 ,SUM(DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT) AS TOTAL_DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP
WHERE DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED')  AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) TOTAL
ON NET.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=TOTAL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NET.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD=TOTAL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
) REV
  INNER JOIN 
(

SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT/NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT  FROM 
(SEL SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BKGS_POS WHERE  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED') GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) NET
INNER JOIN
(SELECT SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BKGS_POS  WHERE  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED' )
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) TOTAL
ON NET.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=TOTAL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND NET.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TOTAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TOTAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NET.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD=TOTAL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD

 )  BKGS
ON REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=BKGS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD

WHERE   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_REVENUE_BY_PID SBP 
WHERE SBP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND SBP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SBP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
GROUP BY REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SALES_REP_NUMBER )
